requirement_topic.en: EMC Compliance — ABNT NBR 55032 / CISPR 32 (Electromagnetic Emissions from Multimedia Equipment)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC合规——ABNT NBR 55032 / CISPR 32（多媒体设备电磁发射）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC合規——ABNT NBR 55032 / CISPR 32（多媒體設備電磁發射）

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices sold in Brazil must comply with applicable electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) emission limits. The primary Brazilian EMC standard for multimedia equipment — which includes Wi-Fi routers, IoT devices, and information technology and communications equipment — is ABNT NBR 55032, the Brazilian adoption of CISPR 32 (Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements). Compliance with ABNT NBR 55032 is typically demonstrated through laboratory testing and is required as part of ANATEL homologation and INMETRO certification processes. Brazil follows the CISPR framework for EMC, meaning that devices designed and tested to CISPR 32 may have a closer alignment to Brazilian requirements than to the US FCC Part 15B approach, but separate Brazilian conformity assessment is still required. Additional ABNT NBR standards may apply for conducted emissions, immunity, and other EMC parameters depending on product type.
summary.zh: 在巴西销售的无线/物联网设备须符合适用的电磁兼容（EMC）发射限值。多媒体设备（包括Wi-Fi路由器、物联网设备及信息技术和通信设备）的主要巴西EMC标准为ABNT NBR 55032，即CISPR 32（多媒体设备电磁兼容性——发射要求）的巴西版本。ABNT NBR 55032的合规性通常通过实验室检测证明，且作为ANATEL型式认可和INMETRO认证程序的一部分。巴西遵循CISPR框架进行EMC合规，意味着依据CISPR 32设计和检测的设备与巴西要求的一致性，可能高于与美国FCC第15B部分方法的一致性，但仍须进行独立的巴西符合性评估。根据产品类型，还可能适用其他涵盖传导发射、抗扰度及其他EMC参数的ABNT NBR标准。
summary.zht: 在巴西銷售的無線/物聯網裝置須符合適用的電磁相容（EMC）發射限值。多媒體設備（包括Wi-Fi路由器、物聯網裝置及信息技術和通訊設備）的主要巴西EMC標準為ABNT NBR 55032，即CISPR 32（多媒體設備電磁相容性——發射要求）的巴西版本。ABNT NBR 55032的合規性通常通過實驗室檢測證明，且作為ANATEL型式認可和INMETRO認證程序的一部分。巴西遵循CISPR框架進行EMC合規，意味著依據CISPR 32設計和檢測的裝置與巴西要求的一致性，可能高於與美國FCC第15B部分方法的一致性，但仍須進行獨立的巴西符合性評估。根據產品類型，還可能適用其他涵蓋傳導發射、抗擾度及其他EMC參數的ABNT NBR標準。

standards_or_laws: ABNT NBR 55032 — Brazilian adoption of CISPR 32; electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment, emission requirements
CISPR 32 — IEC/CISPR international standard for emissions from multimedia equipment (basis for ABNT NBR 55032)
ABNT NBR 55035 — Brazilian adoption of CISPR 35; electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment, immunity requirements
ANATEL homologation technical requirements — EMC test requirements included in homologation process

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for information technology and multimedia equipment is governed by GB 9254 (electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of IT equipment — limits and methods of measurement, based on CISPR 22) for emissions, and GB/T 17625 series for harmonics and related conducted emissions. These are mandatory requirements under the CCC scheme for in-scope products. China's GB 9254 is broadly aligned with the CISPR 22 / CISPR 32 framework, so test data from Chinese CISPR-aligned laboratories may provide partial evidence, but Brazil requires conformity assessment by an ANATEL or INMETRO recognised process, not Chinese CCC alone.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术和多媒体设备的EMC合规由GB 9254（信息技术设备电磁骚扰限值和测量方法，基于CISPR 22）规范发射，以及GB/T 17625系列规范谐波和相关传导发射。这些是CCC体系对范围内产品的强制要求。中国GB 9254与CISPR 22 / CISPR 32框架大体一致，因此来自中国CISPR合规实验室的检测数据可提供部分证据，但巴西要求通过ANATEL或INMETRO认可的程序进行符合性评估，而非仅凭中国CCC。
summary.zht: 在中國，信息技術和多媒體設備的EMC合規由GB 9254（信息技術設備電磁騷擾限值和測量方法，基於CISPR 22）規範發射，以及GB/T 17625系列規範諧波和相關傳導發射。這些是CCC體系對範圍內產品的強制要求。中國GB 9254與CISPR 22 / CISPR 32框架大體一致，因此來自中國CISPR合規實驗室的檢測數據可提供部分證據，但巴西要求通過ANATEL或INMETRO認可的程序進行符合性評估，而非僅憑中國CCC。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 — China EMC emissions standard for information technology equipment (based on CISPR 22; mandatory under CCC)
GB/T 17625 series — China standards for harmonic currents and conducted disturbances
GB/T 9254.1 — updated China EMC standard aligned with CISPR 32 for multimedia equipment

gap.en: Chinese CCC-related EMC test reports to GB 9254 or GB/T 9254.1 (CISPR 32 basis) provide useful technical reference data but do not substitute for Brazilian ABNT NBR 55032 conformity assessment. EMC testing must be conducted or recognised through the ANATEL homologation or INMETRO certification process. Test facilities used must be acceptable to ANATEL and/or INMETRO. Immunity testing to ABNT NBR 55035 (CISPR 35) may also be required depending on product category and applicable Portaria.
gap.zh: 基于GB 9254或GB/T 9254.1（CISPR 32基础）的中国CCC相关EMC检测报告提供了有价值的技术参考数据，但不能替代巴西ABNT NBR 55032符合性评估。EMC检测须通过ANATEL型式认可或INMETRO认证程序进行或被认可。所用检测机构须经ANATEL和/或INMETRO认可。根据产品类别和适用Portaria，可能还需要按ABNT NBR 55035（CISPR 35）进行抗扰度检测。
gap.zht: 基於GB 9254或GB/T 9254.1（CISPR 32基礎）的中國CCC相關EMC檢測報告提供了有價值的技術參考數據，但不能替代巴西ABNT NBR 55032符合性評估。EMC檢測須通過ANATEL型式認可或INMETRO認證程序進行或被認可。所用檢測機構須經ANATEL和/或INMETRO認可。根據產品類別和適用Portaria，可能還需要按ABNT NBR 55035（CISPR 35）進行抗擾度檢測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ABNT NBR 55032 / CISPR 32 EMC compliance required as part of ANATEL homologation and INMETRO certification processes in Brazil
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 9254 EMC compliance required under CCC for in-scope information technology and multimedia equipment in China

source.publisher: ABNT — Associação Brasileira de Normas Técnicas (Brazilian standards body)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brazil EMC compliance for multimedia and IoT devices requires conformity to ABNT NBR 55032 (CISPR 32 adoption). Chinese CCC EMC test reports provide useful technical reference only and do not substitute for Brazilian conformity assessment. EMC testing must be integrated into the ANATEL homologation or INMETRO certification process. Verify applicable ABNT NBR standards and accepted test laboratories with a qualified Brazilian regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴西多媒体和物联网设备的EMC合规要求符合ABNT NBR 55032（CISPR 32采用版本）。中国CCC EMC检测报告仅作为有价值的技术参考，不能替代巴西符合性评估。EMC检测须纳入ANATEL型式认可或INMETRO认证程序。请向合格的巴西监管专业人士核验适用ABNT NBR标准和认可检测实验室。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴西多媒體和物聯網裝置的EMC合規要求符合ABNT NBR 55032（CISPR 32採用版本）。中國CCC EMC檢測報告僅作為有價值的技術參考，不能替代巴西符合性評估。EMC檢測須納入ANATEL型式認可或INMETRO認證程序。請向合格的巴西監管專業人士核驗適用ABNT NBR標準和認可檢測實驗室。
